title: Senior Revenue Manager at Thomas Cook India

jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at Thomas Cook India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Revenue Manager with drive and ambition, Thomas Cook India in Ranchi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Thomas Cook India:
Thomas Cook India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Food Safety

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Thomas Cook India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
